title: Beef Casserole
description: A hearty beef casserole recipe made with tender beef and a rich, flavorful sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the sliced Polish sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Stir in the mushroom gravy and beef broth, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the mixture to the casserole dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake the casserole for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before serving.
